reviews.text: The best in town! Knowledgeable, professional, timely, and the pricing is reasonable. PCI is always there when I need them!
Reliable,Reliable,Reliable! They give me notice when my day of spraying is up. They come when they say they will.
Been with this company for over 10 years. Gives great service and employees are very friendly.
Something was biting the heck out of me. I had scratched my arms and legs so much they bled.
Angela was very professional, made sure she left no foot prints in the house, was informative about what to do to reduce scorpians in the house. We're very pleased with her services.
It was recommended to me by a close neighbor (a customer of PCI for nearly 20 years) to consider switching my current pest control provider.
Great professional, courteous and friendly service from Angela. She always reminds us of our appointment a day ahead. Definitely a trusted company to have for your home service.
The general manager (Jim) is a very pleasant guy. His prices are affordable and he is flexible with scheduling appointments. If you have a pest problem call this place. He does a very good job.
Mike with Pest Control Inc., comes out to my house each month and sprays my house. He's always professional.
Affordable and Professional, always willing to do what's best for the customer. I've been using them for 4 months now and have been very pleased.
9+ years of great monthly service from this family owned business. Friendly, trustworthy, on time, thorough. Recommend to coworkers and neighbors.
The employee you have been sending us has been a real plus to your company. Always friendly, clean, and willing to help. She deserves a real pat on the back and let her know she is doing great.
I've used many Pest Control Companies over the years but I won't switch now! This company is affordable, reliable.
Great service, guarantees work, very happy with PCI!
Our Tech Angela is awesome. Very thorough and extremely pleasant. Very happy with our service.
The service person who comes to the house is exceptionally conscientious and very professional.
Since 2002, I have tried several pest control companies in town and for the last 6 years it has been PCI for my bug control.
We have been with PCI for many years and rate their quality of service a real 5 star. Our technician, Angela, is always on time, friendly, and very thorough, a true professional. Thanks PCI.
Angela is a breath of fresh air. She's incredibly thorough and always brings a smile to our house. You are lucky to have her!
I've always had great, friendly service. Very knowledgeable and informed on pest control options from monthly insect maintenance to bigger, more strategic pest control jobs. High marks all around.
Best service in town. John took care of my bee problem immediately!
Pest Control Inc has been keeping my home pest free for almost ten years. They are professional, reliable and just nice people.
I have been with PCI for a few months and the original Rep. retired and I've had a different Rep the last few times.
Pest Control Inc is a great pest control company. I have not seen any bugs since they have been servicing my home.
John has been doing the pest control for all my homes in Las Vegas for many years now. They are a great bunch to do business with.
